meaning: adj.不可宽恕的,不能原谅的
examples: Business is a competitive activity. It is very fierce and very unforgiving.
Wadi Hitan is a beautiful but unforgiving place.
Watercolor doesn't respond well to revisions, so it may well be the most unforgiving art medium.
Despite sporting a training mode, smART writer is unforgiving, demanding large, neatly printed letters.
